name: Finance Agent
description: Independent finance agent with live Supabase database and Storage access.
features: Run the autonomous end-to-end financial analysis pipeline.
Calculate growth, profitability, liquidity, leverage, cash-flow, and efficiency metrics.
Run DCF scenarios and comparable valuation multiples.
Produce a 0-100 evidence-led financial risk assessment.
Pull live invoice rows from the configured Supabase database using bounded read-only filters.
